feed.title: 9GAG
feed.subtitle: Hot posts from 9gag.com (no native feed; parsed from the page's window._config JSON). NSFW posts are tagged [NSFW].

entry.title: Years pass. Friendships remain. The chaos stays exactly the same.
Cop break checks semi
Gaming pc
Imagine missing your mother's funeral because your wife is like this
abA7xvO
Cost of living crisis
Well if it isn’t the consequences of my own actions…….
Going outside feels like
A perfect job

An infuriating book has arrived in our house, called 20,000 Cows. It's a wordsearch, but the only word to find is COW. Sounds easy? This is page 1, where there is one cow to be found, if you fancy a try.
Quantum Mechanics
Someone´s gonna get arrested
Anyone thinking it's going to massively flop?
Hear me out...
Good movie!
Fight at the stadium
Looks like they found a 2nd Sphinx!
Remember dudes
Not honest work
Democraps won't like this one bit!!
Do the health-puppy
Helping her friend to write an essay, such a kind hearted young lady!
The Last Video I have from my cat. He left on saturday and we never found him again. He was 17 years old.. probably Chose to Go on His final adventure. I Just Wish I knew for certain
I dare you to make it work anywhere else in Europe
Do the money puppy
I miss Wii Sports. Gotta dig out the old system and play it again.
Do the Honey Badger

Women got on bus and refused to pay for tickets. Bus driver refused to drive. Women threw tantrum.
Using a nuke in a knife fight
Dodged a bullet I guess
Last men standing
It's Wednesday my dude, Reckless driving almost cost her the life she literally had her eyes glued on the phone while driving damnit
At a rather inauspicious moment
He did the right thing
It just hits different
Thats nice, Kevin Hart got a bike.
Someone needs to hear this

There are only 6 animals considered human hunters in the world, and polar bears are one of them.

Poor JD

Best batman movie of all time no cap
Idennaquile

NEW - The feelings of shock and disappointment on the face of Pakistan's Prime Minister, after he was informed by the Iranian delegation they are leaving after Trump threatened them.
Don't tell the elf
Right man, right place, right time

I've never come this way before. It's the cobblestones.

Ah yes... We all know what this feels like
That escalated quickly
Even if you won the lottery today, you would never be able to buy that feeling in your life

Bobby Prince, the composer of many legendary game musics including Doom, Doom II and Duke Nukem 3D passed away on June 16, 2026. May he rest in peace, and thank you for all the fun!

Referred a friend for a job. Now HR wants to interview me again
Dude really into swords
